title: SGF Receipts Estimates for FY 2015, FY 2016, and FY 2017

events.description: The Consensus Group met to revise the estimate for FY 2015 and develop the initial estimates for FY 2016 and FY 2017.
State General Fund Receipts Estimates for FY 2015, FY 2016, and FY 2017

evidence.quote: Estimates for the State General Fund (SGF) are developed using a consensus process.
The revised estimate of $5.769 billion represents 2.0 percent growth above final FY 2014 receipts.
The initial estimate for FY 2016 is $5.811 billion, which is $42.7 million, or 0.7 percent, above the newly revised FY 2015 figure.
The initial FY 2017 estimate of $5.877 billion represents $65.2 million growth (1.1 percent) above the new FY 2016 figure.
The revised estimate of SGF receipts for FY 2015 is $5.769 billion, a decrease of $205.9 million below the previous estimate.
evidence.note: Source: Kansas Legislative Research Department, Gov. Brownback/LCC – KLRD/DOB – SGF Receipts Estimates for FY 2015, FY 2016, and FY 2017 – November 17, 2014
